Description: Jump to a node based on a block type comparison
Title: Jump If Block Type Comparison

Options.Description:
Block mask to check in order to jump to an index.

Mask Symbols:

Default = TARGET_BLOCK
! = NOT
^ = NEIGHBORING
< = BELOW
> = ABOVE
~ = NEXT TO

Example:
To jump to an index when the current block is below Rock_Stone, do:<Rock_Stone
Options.Label: Mask
